topic.title: Mandatory Attendance: Final Presentations
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

A quick reminder that attendance is mandatory for both days of final presentations. This applies whether you are presenting or in the audience.

Please plan to arrive on time, and if you're not presenting, be a supportive presence for your classmates, it makes a real difference.

Looking forward to seeing everyone's hard work come together. Good luck!

 

Best,
Arundhati Bandopadhyaya
Teaching Assistant, INFO 7375
